meta.title: QFriendly — AI Relationship Guidance
meta.description: Focused on building, maintaining, growing, and saving love relationships. Four AI experts, four perspectives, guiding you through every stage of love.

hero.title: Relationships are complicated. You don't have to figure them out alone.
hero.subtitle: Focused on building, maintaining, growing, and saving love relationships — four AI experts, four perspectives, guiding you through every stage of love.

trust.title: From building to saving — guiding your love relationship every step of the way

items.title: Build — Relationship Foundations
items.description: Build security, trust, and healthy communication patterns. Lay a solid foundation for your love to grow.

items.title: Maintain — Daily Nurturing
items.description: Daily emotional care that keeps your relationship warm, connected, and resilient — before small cracks become big breaks.

items.title: Grow — Attraction & Escalation
items.description: Understand attraction dynamics, navigate ambiguity, and move your relationship forward with confidence and authenticity.

items.title: Save — Crisis & Recovery
items.description: When trust breaks, cold wars set in, or breakup looms — think clearly, find direction, and rebuild from strength.

experts.title: The Relationship Advisory Circle
experts.subtitle: Four distinct perspectives. One goal: helping you build healthier relationships.

evan.name: Evan Pierce
evan.description: Calm, rational, and structured. Evan helps you build a steady foundation and reduce conflict through clear communication and emotional stability.

liam.name: Liam Hart
liam.description: Warm, supportive, and gently coaching. Liam helps you nurture your relationship day by day, keeping things soft, comfortable, and deeply connected.

noah.name: Noah Sinclair
noah.description: Insightful, sharp, and slightly playful. Noah helps you understand attraction dynamics, navigate ambiguity, and build magnetic connection.

adrian.name: Dr. Adrian Cole
adrian.description: Clinical yet deeply empathetic. Dr. Cole helps you think clearly when things fall apart — cold wars, trust breakdowns, and crisis navigation.

cases.title: Does this sound like you?
cases.subtitle: These are real emotional patterns people bring to QFriendly every day. You are not alone in this.

items.question: Why does he suddenly become distant?
items.summary: Sudden distance often signals unspoken emotional pressure, not loss of interest. Learn to read what's happening beneath the surface.

items.question: Am I emotionally dependent?
items.summary: Emotional dependency isn't weakness — it's a learned attachment pattern. Understand the difference between love and emotional reliance.

items.question: How do I stop overthinking in relationships?
items.summary: Overthinking is your brain trying to protect you. But it can also sabotage connection. Learn to quiet the noise without ignoring your needs.

items.question: Does she still like me?
items.summary: Mixed signals are exhausting. Learn to read behavioral patterns instead of decoding every single message.

items.question: We keep having the same fight — what do I do?
items.summary: Recurring conflicts are rarely about the surface topic. Discover the emotional pattern underneath and break the cycle.

items.question: How do I rebuild trust after it's been broken?
items.summary: Trust isn't rebuilt in one conversation. It's rebuilt through consistent, predictable actions over time. Here's where to start.

items.quote: It feels like talking to someone who actually gets it. No scripts, no generic advice — just real understanding.
items.author: Sarah, 24

items.quote: I was embarrassed to talk to friends about my relationship anxiety. QFriendly gave me perspective without judgment.
items.author: Marcus, 28

items.quote: The different expert perspectives helped me see my situation from angles I never considered. It changed how I communicate.
items.author: Jade, 22

tips.title: Small shifts that make a difference

items.title: Name the emotion before reacting to it
items.description: When you feel triggered, pause and say to yourself: 'I am feeling anxious right now.' Naming it reduces its power by up to 50%.

items.title: Use 'I feel' instead of 'You always'
items.description: 'You never listen' triggers defense. 'I feel unheard when...' invites conversation. Same need, different door.

items.title: Ask: 'What do you need right now?'
items.description: Most relationship arguments are really about unmet needs disguised as surface complaints. Directly asking cuts through the noise.

items.title: The 24-hour rule for difficult conversations
items.description: If something bothers you, wait 24 hours before bringing it up. If it still matters after a day, it's worth discussing calmly.

items.title: Curiosity over accusation
items.description: Replace 'Why did you do that?' with 'Help me understand what happened.' The first triggers shame; the second invites honesty.

items.question: Is QFriendly a real therapist?
items.answer: QFriendly is an AI relationship guidance platform, not a licensed therapist. Our experts are AI personas trained on relationship psychology frameworks. They provide compassionate guidance and perspective — not clinical diagnosis or treatment.

items.question: Is my conversation really private?
items.answer: Yes. We do not store your conversations on our servers. Your chats are private by design — no personal data is collected, and no conversation history is accessible to anyone but you.

items.question: Can I switch between experts?
items.answer: Absolutely. You can switch between Evan, Liam, Noah, and Dr. Cole at any time during your conversation. Each brings a different perspective, and you can explore all four.

items.question: What kind of relationship issues can I talk about?
items.answer: You can talk about anything related to love relationships: communication struggles, attachment anxiety, mixed signals, trust issues, conflict patterns, emotional distance, breakups, and more. All relationship types and situations are welcome.

footer.tagline: A space for your emotional world.

chat.expertPanelSubtitle: Each expert brings a unique perspective to your conversation

liam.greeting: Hey there. I'm glad you're here.
liam.intro: Relationships don't need to be perfect — they just need care. I'm here to help you nurture what matters, one small moment at a time. What's on your mind today?
suggestions: How can I make my partner feel more appreciated?
We've been feeling distant lately — what can I do?
How do I bring up a difficult topic without starting a fight?

evan.greeting: Welcome. Take a breath — you're in the right place.
evan.intro: Stability isn't about avoiding conflict — it's about building something strong enough to handle it. Let's work through this together, calmly and clearly. What brings you here?
suggestions: How do I stop small arguments from escalating?
What does a healthy relationship foundation look like?
How can I feel more secure in my relationship?

noah.greeting: Hello. Ready to see things from a new angle?
noah.intro: Attraction isn't magic — it's psychology, timing, and genuine connection. I'll help you understand the dynamics at play and make the moves that feel authentic to you. What's the situation?
suggestions: How do I move things forward without being pushy?
How can I tell if the attraction is mutual?
What makes someone feel drawn to you naturally?

adrian.greeting: Hello. I know this is hard. Let's think through it together.
adrian.intro: Crisis clouds judgment, but clarity is possible. I'll help you step back, understand what's really happening, and make decisions from a place of strength — not fear. Tell me what's going on.
suggestions: How do I know if this relationship can be saved?
We're in a cold war — how do I break the silence?
How do I rebuild trust after a major breach?

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using QFriendly ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service.

sections.heading: 2. Description of Service
sections.body: QFriendly is an AI-powered relationship guidance platform that provides conversational support through AI personas. The Service is not a substitute for professional therapy, counseling, or medical advice. Our AI experts provide general guidance and emotional support based on relationship psychology frameworks, not clinical diagnosis or treatment.

sections.heading: 3. User Responsibilities
sections.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to use the Service in compliance with all applicable laws. You may not use the Service to upload, transmit, or share any content that is unlawful, harmful, threatening, abusive, harassing, defamatory, or otherwise objectionable. You must be at least 18 years of age to use the Service, or have the consent of a legal guardian.

sections.heading: 4. Account and Subscription
sections.body: Some features of the Service require a paid subscription. Subscription fees are billed in advance on a monthly or yearly basis as selected during checkout. You are responsible for providing accurate billing information. We reserve the right to change subscription fees with reasonable notice.

sections.heading: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.body: The Service, including its design, code, content, branding, and AI personas, is owned by QFriendly and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works based on the Service without our prior written consent.

sections.heading: 6. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.body: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure. AI-generated responses are for informational purposes only and should not be considered professional advice.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, QFriendly shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the twelve months preceding the claim.

sections.heading: 8. Termination
sections.body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for violation of these terms. You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease.

sections.heading: 9. Changes to Terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. We will notify users of material changes via email or through the Service. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.heading: 10. Governing Law
sections.body: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which QFriendly operates. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be resolved through binding arbitration where permitted by law.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body:
Account Information: When you sign up, we collect your email address and authentication credentials. These are managed through our authentication provider and we do not have access to your password.

Usage Data: We collect information about your interactions with the Service, including expert selections, message timestamps, and subscription status. We do not store the content of your conversations on our servers.

Payment Information: Payment processing is handled by our payment providers (PayPal). We do not collect or store your full credit card details.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.body:
We use your information to:
- Provide, maintain, and improve the Service
- Process your subscription and payments
- Send service-related communications (e.g., subscription confirmations, account notices)
- Enforce our Terms of Service and prevent misuse
- Analyze usage patterns to improve the AI guidance experience

sections.heading: 3. Data Storage and Security
sections.body: Your account data is stored on secure servers using industry-standard encryption. While we implement reasonable security measures, no method of electronic storage is 100% secure. We continuously monitor our systems for vulnerabilities and respond to security incidents promptly.

sections.heading: 4. Cookies and Tracking
sections.body: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We may use analytics cookies to understand how users interact with the Service. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. We do not use tracking cookies for advertising purposes.

sections.heading: 5. Third-Party Services
sections.body: We use third-party services for authentication (Better Auth), payment processing (PayPal), hosting (Vercel), and database services (Supabase/PostgreSQL). These providers have their own privacy policies and data handling practices. We encourage you to review their policies.

sections.heading: 6. Your Rights
sections.body:
Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to:
- Access the personal data we hold about you
- Request correction or deletion of your data
- Object to or restrict certain processing activities
- Data portability
- Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent

To exercise these rights, contact us at the email address provided in the Contact section.

sections.heading: 7. Children's Privacy
sections.body: The Service is not intended for individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that a child has provided us with personal data, we will delete it promptly.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to Privacy Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify users of material changes via email or through the Service. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.heading: 1. Refund Eligibility
sections.body: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all new subscription purchases. If you are unsatisfied with the Service for any reason, you may request a full refund within 14 days of your initial purchase date. This guarantee applies once per user.

sections.heading: 2. How to Request a Refund
sections.body: To request a refund, please contact us at the email address provided in the Contact section. Include your account email address and the date of purchase. We process refund requests within 5 business days. Refunds are issued to the original payment method used during purchase.

sections.heading: 3. Non-Refundable Situations
sections.body:
Refunds are not available in the following circumstances:
- More than 14 days have passed since your initial purchase
- You have previously received a refund from us
- The refund request is for a subscription renewal (as opposed to initial purchase)
- You have violated our Terms of Service
- The purchase was made more than 90 days ago

sections.heading: 4. Subscription Cancellation
sections.body: You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. Cancellation prevents future billing but does not automatically trigger a refund for the current billing period. After cancellation, you retain access to paid features until the end of your current billing cycle.

sections.heading: 5. Chargebacks
sections.body: If you initiate a chargeback with your payment provider without first contacting us for a refund, we reserve the right to suspend your account while the dispute is pending. We encourage you to reach out to us first so we can resolve the issue directly.

sections.heading: 6. Contact
sections.body: For refund inquiries or any billing questions, please contact us at support@qfriendly.ai. We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.
